caption: A person wearing blue medical scrubs, a patterned surgical cap, and a light-colored face mask stands in a room, leaning over a wooden table. The room has neutral-colored walls with a white board and a doorway leading to another area where a blue drape covers a bed or table. On the wooden table, there is a green rectangular mat and a small electronic device. The person rests their left hand on the green mat while leaning forward. Pink silhouettes of a person and on-screen text overlays are visible in each frame; the text reads "Day 1" on the left and "Sim Week" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the person remains in a mostly static leaning position, with only slight movements in their posture and hand placement as they maintain contact with the table.
